# Test Fixture Provenance

All AGT-shaped test fixtures in this directory are derived from Microsoft
Agent Governance Toolkit v3.1.0 pre-release documentation and public source
code, as of 2026-04-13.

Source: https://github.com/microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit

Fixtures represent the shape of AGT governance artifacts, not actual AGT
SDK objects. All digest values are deterministic SHA-256 hashes of known
test strings (not placeholders or truncated values).

PEAC validates the structure of carried values, not upstream truth.
